name: ANY.RUN
description: This app enables you to detonate files and URLs to ANY.RUN Sandbox for analysis, retrieve detailed reports, and obtain information about IoCs from the ANY.RUN Threat Intelligence Lookup database

anyrun_api_key.description: API Key used for API authentication

anyrun_timeout.description: Number of seconds to wait for a request to timeout

actions.description: Validate the asset configuration for connectivity using supplied configuration
Get the verdict of a specific analysis
Get reports of a specific URL or File hash analysis from your history
actions.verbose: This action requests a list of already completed reports of a URL or File hash analysis.

entity_type.description: Entity type to search in history
entity_type.name: entity_type

entity_value.description: URL (Size range: 2-256) or Hash (sha256, sha1, md5)
entity_value.name: entity_value

actions.verbose: This action requests information about URL/IP/Domain/File from the ANY.RUN TI Lookup database.

entity_type.description: Entity type to search in database
entity_type.name: entity_type

entity_value.description: URL (Size range: 2-256) or Hash (sha256, sha1, md5) or Domain or IP
entity_value.name: entity_value

lookup_depth.description: Specify the number of days from the current date for which you want to lookup
lookup_depth.name: lookup_depth

actions.description: Get detailed JSON report for analysis
Get detailed STIX report for analysis
Get detailed MISP report for analysis
Get detailed HTML report for analysis
Get list of IoCs for analysis
Detonate a URL for analysis using Windows VM
actions.verbose: This action requires a URL to analyse. All other parameters are optional - for more information about them refer to official documentation (https://any.run/api-documentation/).

env_type.description: Environment preset type. You can select 'development' env for OS Windows 10 x64. For all other cases, 'complete' env is required
env_type.name: env_type

opt_network_residential_proxy_geo.description: Residential proxy geo location option (Default: fastest)
opt_network_residential_proxy_geo.name: opt_network_residential_proxy_geo

obj_ext_extension.description: Specify whether to change the file extension to a valid one (Default: True)
obj_ext_extension.name: obj_ext_extension

user_tags.description:
Append user tags to new analysis. Only characters a-z, A-Z, 0-9, hyphen (-), and comma (,)
            are allowed. Max tag length: 16 characters. Max unique tags per task: 8.
user_tags.name: user_tags

actions.description: Make a query to the ANY.RUN Threat Intelligence database using flexible searches for Indicators of Compromise (IOCs), Indicators of Attack(IOAs), and Indicators of Behavior (IOBs) to investigate and gather extensive and in-depth information on cyber threats
actions.verbose: Perform investigative actions by using the ANY.RUN Threat Intelligence Portal API method. This action requires ANY.RUN TI License. For more information about available parameters refer to official documentation (https://intelligence.any.run/TI_Lookup_Query_Guide_v6.pdf).

query.description: Raw query with necessary filters. Supports condition concatenation with AND, OR, NOT and Parentheses ()
query.name: query

lookup_depth.description: Specify the number of days from the current date for which you want to lookup
lookup_depth.name: lookup_depth
